Notice Of Motion And Motion By Pltf To Compel Production Of Documents By Deft
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: MICHAEL R. SIMMONDS, ESQ. for Preben Brandenhoff m.d., plaintiff and moving party; APRIL N. LOVE, ESQ. for James Avery II M.D., defendant and opposing party.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS MODIFIED:
PLAINTIFF PREBEN BRANDENHOFF's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents By Defendant is granted. Defendant shall redact any identification of individual patients. Defendant is ordered to produce further within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Production Of Documents By Non-Party Physician Foundation Medical Associates Inc
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: MICHAEL R. SIMMONDS, ESQ. for Preben Brandenhoff M.D., plaintiff and moving party; APRIL N. LOVE, ESQ. for James Avery II M.D., defendant and opposing party.

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:
PLAINTIFF PREBEN BRANDENHOFF's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents By Non Party Physician Foundation Medical Associates, Inc. is granted. Non Party Physician Foundation Medical Associates, Inc. shall redact any identification of individual patients. Non Party Physician Foundation Medical Associates, Inc. is ordered to produce further within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2010 Set For Trial On Dec-20-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-06-10 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 606

Defendant G. James Avery, Ii'S Motion And Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Maureen McClain, Esq. of Littler Mendelson, P.C., 415-677-3133 for defendant and moving party James Avery II
Tomio Narita, Esq. of Simmonds & Narita LLP, 415-283-1010 for plaintiff and opposing party Preben Brandenhoff

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
Defendant G. James Avery, II'S Motion And Special Motion To Strike IS DENIED; DEFENDANT HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE COMPLAINT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST UNDER CCP 425.16(C) IS DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
